MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-22-2011 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECOGNITION OR PRIOR CONSOLIDATION AND FOR ASSIGNMENT TO A SINGLE JUDGE HELD. ALL PARTIES IN THE CASE WERE PRESENT. THE COURT CONSOLIDATED CASE NUNMBERS 07-468009 AND 09-488152 WITH CASE NUMBER 03-425099 AS THE LEAD CASE FOR ALL PURPOSES AND DENIED SINGLE ASSIGNMENT. THE JURY TRIAL WAS SET FOR 5/21/2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES STIPULATED TO EXTEND THE 5 YEAR STATUTE FOR THE LEAD CASE NUMBER 03-425099 FROM 6/1/12 TO 8/1/12. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: CAROL HARABURDA FOR PLAINTIFF, CSR# 8052, 925-360-6065 (206)
